{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of the King’s Key
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Path]] of the [[King’s Key]] is a specialized force Path created and exclusively practiced by [[Monarch]] [[Reigan Shen]], also known as [[the Emperor]] of the [[Rosegold continent]]. This [[Path]] is defined by its connection to spatial authority, a power [[Shen]] acquired during his youth after bonding with a [[Sage’s Remnant]] capable of commanding space. The primary function of the [[Path]] is the management of an extra-spatial vault, which serves as a private repository for various items including weapons, techniques, and even enemies. This [[vault]] allows the user to manifest portals and access spatially sealed treasures. Beyond simple storage, the [[Path]] can be used to create [[void]] spaces, transport armies, or manifest defensive measures and offensive weapons, such as spears of fire and destruction. It has also been utilized in the creation of complex devices, including a rumored heart for an isolated new world. While often used for efficient transportation and storage, the [[Path]]'s capabilities extend to providing emergency defenses and creating razor-edged blades of [[madra]].}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of the King’s Key]] was created by [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[King]]'s Key is a force Path touched by the authority of space.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]]'s [[construct]] has analyzed the [[Path of the King’s Key]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] revealed the [[Path of the King’s Key]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Path of the King’s Key]] can create portals leading onto a [[void]] space.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Soulforge]] was made with the [[Path of the King’s Key]] to be the heart of an isolated new world.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Path of the King’s Key]] can be used to open portals onto spatially sealed treasures.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
